layout.name: fireDelayTicks
layout.title: Timer
layout.tooltip: Number of frames the cannon waits before firing.

layout.name: soundID
layout.title: Sound
layout.tooltip: ID of sound effect to play.

layout.name: spawnAttached
layout.title: Spawn Attached
layout.tooltip: If set to true, the spawned NPC will follow the NPC's path and no new NPCs will be spawned until the attached NPC is dead. Use with, for example, Dino Torch Fire.
